'''鈭歨-t-zh-l''' ('''kahatzheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flamdoodle|flamdoodle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flamdoodle|flamdoodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-t-zh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kahatzheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihatzheloko|thihatzheloko]] || [[word:jihatzheloko|jihatzheloko]] || [[word:shihatzheloko|shihatzheloko]] || [[word:kihatzheloko|kihatzheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhatzheloko|thuthuhatzheloko]] || [[word:jujuhatzheloko|jujuhatzheloko]] || [[word:shushuhatzheloko|shushuhatzheloko]] || [[word:kukuhatzheloko|kukuhatzheloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohatzheloko|thohatzheloko]] || [[word:johatzheloko|johatzheloko]] || [[word:shohatzheloko|shohatzheloko]] || [[word:kohatzheloko|kohatzheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hatzheloko|th忙hatzheloko]] || [[word:j忙hatzheloko|j忙hatzheloko]] || [[word:sh忙hatzheloko|sh忙hatzheloko]] || [[word:k忙hatzheloko|k忙hatzheloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahatzheloko|thahatzheloko]] || [[word:jahatzheloko|jahatzheloko]] || [[word:shahatzheloko|shahatzheloko]] || [[word:kahatzheloko|kahatzheloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
